programs.title: American Muslims: A History Revealed
programs.desc: Thomas Jefferson owned a copy of the Qur'an; George Washington owned enslaved people who were Muslim; a Muslim diplomat breaks his Ramadan fast in the White House in 1805.

programs.title: Journey Home to the USS Arizona
programs.desc: The family of Raymond Haerry Sr. travels from New Jersey to Oahu, Hawaii, to place his ashes at the USS Arizona Memorial at Pearl Harbor.

programs.title: BBC News: The Context USA
programs.desc: Coverage from Washington, D.C. and London, with a regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discussing the biggest stories of the day.

programs.title: BBC News America
programs.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programs.title: PBS News Hour
programs.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programs.title: Energy Switch
programs.desc: Native Americans build energy projects on tribal lands to change their future; with CEO Cheri Smith, Alliance for Tribal Clean Energy and COO Ken Ahmann, Colusa Indian Energy.
